title: trifolium repens var. ochranthum
intro: Trifolium repens var. ochranthum, also known as the creeping clover, is a perennial legume that is native to Australia. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Trifolium repens var. ochranthum include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, improve digestion, and support immune function. Trifolium repens var. ochranthum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being.
